titleStmt.title: SII 40.133: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 133. (A.R. No. B. 267 of 1931.) Tirupati, Peddapuram Taluk, East Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Śingāravallabhasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1324, Makara Saṁkrānti.
Records the gift of a flower garden to the temple of Śringārarāya and the provision made for its upkeep by a certain Koṇdamīndi Siṅgamayya on behalf of Tirumala Rāmānujāchārya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tasme(smai)namasmē(stē)ravacō viśēṣabuddādi siddhāṁta jayekaśilō . dōṣakavēṣata da
śēṣarakṣārāmāya rāmānuja dēśikāya . śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1324
Agunēṁṭi makara saṁkrāṁti kālamaṁddu śriṁggārarāyaniki tirumala śrīrā
mānujācā¨ryyakaiṁka¨ryyamugānu makoṁḍamīṁdi siṁgamayyaṁgāru tirupati
kiṁ paḍumaṭanu śrīrāmānuja sarasu darini peṭṭiṁcina tirunaṁdavanamu Okaṭi
yi tirunaṁdanavanamu sēsēvāriki tiru
pati Uttarāna Ālayapu Uttarāna cēnu puṭṭeṁḍu yiṁduku
naṁ naḍimi tiruvīdhini Uttarāna kalaṁgaṟta lakṣaṇayyaṁgāri tū¨rppuna
nu yi tirunaṁdanavanaṁ sēsi vāriki cātupaḍigā Ūri
yaṁ sagaṁbālu briṁdāvananāmanu vēyiṁpa sagaṁ mūla
giṁcina saṁddamu Ī dimiṁka¨ryyamu śrī vaiṣṇava rakṣyamu
mummadāsari gaṁgu likhiṁcināṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
